message:
data(metadata): update beads issue tracker and audit index with recent work

- .beads/issues.jsonl: add new closed issues and update existing entries
  reflecting recent session-types truthfulness audit, monitor ordering fix,
  and related work
- audit_index.jsonl: append audit entries for monitor.rs (duplicate-target
  DOWN sort fix), supervision.rs (monitor_ref in sort_key + reverse-index
  pruning), and session_types.rs (transport bridge contract truthfulness)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
